title: Authentication failure with Fal.AI API
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with the Fal.AI API using the wrong header format, n8n returns 'Auth failed. Please check credentials'.
root_cause: The Fal.AI API requires a specific format for the authorization header. Using 'Bearer (API Key)' instead of the required 'Key (API Key)' leads to authentication failures.
fix_steps: Open the node settings for the Fal.AI API call
Change the authorization header from 'Bearer (API Key)' to 'Key (API Key)'
agent_instruction: Update the authorization header to 'Key (API Key)' in the Fal.AI node settings.
